title: Hooked
author: Nir Eyal
description: Build habit-forming products with 4 Claude Code skills covering the Hook Model's four phases: trigger, action, variable reward, and investment.
longDescription: Nir Eyal's Hook Model explains why some products capture attention while others fade away. These 4 skills walk you through each phase of the habit loop — designing external and internal triggers, reducing friction to drive action, creating variable rewards that sustain engagement, and building investment loops that bring users back — giving you an ethical blueprint for products people can't put down.
